key_points: A resource is anything that satisfies human needs
Resources are classified as biotic and abiotic
Renewable resources can be replenished naturally
Non-renewable resources take millions of years to form
Sustainable development means using resources wisely
examples: Land resource supports agriculture and settlements
formulas: Resource usefulness = Technology + Economic feasibility + Cultural acceptability
Sustainable development = Present needs without harming future needs
exam_tips: Remember definitions of renewable and non-renewable resources
Understand the meaning of sustainable development
Know simple examples of biotic and abiotic resources
